narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: O calorão, segundo os especialistas, deve-se à intensificação das alterações climáticas, que tém provocado eventos extremos em todo o território nacional.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote supports the narrative of Amplifying Climate Fears because it explicitly links the current heatwave to climate change, implying that the situation is severe and will lead to extreme events across the country.
